# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    name: storageaccountforlogsandbackups
    location: West US
    sku: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      accessTier: Cool

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: storageaccountforlogsandbackups/blobServiceName
    parent:
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      name: storageaccountforlogsandbackups

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/policies
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: storageaccountforlogsandbackups/blobServiceName/defaultPolicy
    parent:
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
      name: storageaccountforlogsandbackups/blobServiceName

  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: subnet
    parent:
      type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
      name: vnetforlogging

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/keys
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: storageaccountforlogsandbackups/default/accountKey
    parent:
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      name: storageaccountforlogsandbackups

parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: storageaccountforlogsandbackups

  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: West US
